product_definition: battery-grade manganese sulphate / high-purity manganese sulphate proxy
analytical_use: Can illustrate that battery-grade manganese sulphate supply is highly concentrated, but cannot be treated as a fully comparable general manganese processing/refining top-three metric.
blocked_use: Do not use as proof of general manganese refining concentration, bottleneck proof, vulnerability ranking, disruption probability, investment signal, policy recommendation, or geopolitical ranking.
next_action: Search for a source that clearly defines manganese processing/refining denominator and country-share basis; otherwise keep proxy-only language.

metric_or_source: IEA Global Critical Minerals Outlook 2025, emerging battery supply chains section
observed_year_or_context: current battery-grade manganese sulphate production context
analytical_use: Supports the statement that battery-grade manganese sulphate production is highly concentrated.
blocked_use: Do not convert directly into a general processing/refining metric unless denominator alignment is proven.
next_action: Inspect whether IEA provides a downloadable table or chart with denominator details for battery-grade manganese sulphate.

analytical_use: Provides upstream mining concentration comparator for the V2.4 descriptive comparison.
blocked_use: Do not claim full stage comparability with battery-grade manganese sulphate unless product and denominator alignment is resolved.
next_action: Retain mining baseline; do not replace or merge with battery-grade sulphate denominator.

analytical_use: Allows the project to keep manganese in the downstream comparison with explicit proxy limitation.
